data.body:
I hate "LinkedIn poetry."

You know.

The kind where every sentence is separated by a line break.

To lend maximum weight to each statement.

Making a big production out of your latest insight, experience or revelation.

But it comes off trite, smarmy and self-congratulatory.
data.author: did:plc:zfve7b4rk5aro565papa34kx

data.body: (And yes, I've co-opted the very format I despise to show you how grating it is)
